name: SA Corporate Real Estate Limited
summary: SA Corporate Real Estate Limited is a JSE-listed Real Estate Investment Trust (√Ç¬ìREIT√Ç¬î) which owns a diversified portfolio of quality industrial, retail, commercial and residential buildings located primarily in the major metropolitan areas of South Africa with a secondary node in Zambia. The property, excluding investment in listed shares and loans advanced, consists of 192 properties, with 1 629 105 m2 of lettable area, valued at R16.6 billion, and a 50% joint venture in three Zambian properties valued at R1.1 billion.
